title: Simple Vanilla +
description: A simple Vanilla + modpack that aimes for good graphics and performances
body:
A simple modpack that aimes for better performences and better grafics, using Iris and a lot of other mods.

This is a vanilla + modpack wich means it doesnt have server side mods and doesnt change major gameplay mechanics its purpose is to give a better experience of playing Minecraft!

**Enjoy!**

Check Out My Other Projects Too!

Simply Superior :https://modrinth.com/modpack/simply-superior

FPV Elytra :https://modrinth.com/modpack/fpv-elytra
